programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Hole Lot of History
programme.desc: Returning to Fred and Sara's petite historical home, where inspection misses have launched a rescue mission Damon and the crew are tested by leaks, mould, foundation holes, dangerous fireplaces, shocking electrical and a plumbing disaster.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.sub-title: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: On the St. Lawrence River, MJ and Mike get a good deal on an eyesore full of asbestos, and they are forced to call in a remediation team back at the country house, Mike and MJ find out they on the hook to replace its entire leaching field.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.sub-title: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can rebuild it at the country house, they notice water on the basement floor during a mechanical walk-through.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits have not been approved Mike goes to a council meeting hoping to hear good news at the country house, Mike and MJ welcome their designer Sarah Richardson who offers some good advice.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Just when Mike and MJ think things are back on track at the country house, a new discovery about the barn leaves them reeling designer Sarah Richardson joins the flooring debate MJ and his fiancée, Lisa, get married in a picturesque setting.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.sub-title: Summertime Fun: Calgary, AB to Athabasca, AB
programme.desc: Sue and Tom Marcoux have been living out of an 1980's mini RV, but Wade and Jaylene have found them the perfect recycled home.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.sub-title: Tough Trek: Calgary, AB to Spirtwood, SK
programme.desc: Ron and Gail's perfect family home is 750 miles away in Calgary.
